body: I love how quickly my sizes have changed. It’s so validating to witness my body’s evolution! 😍

title: Instagram reel
body: It’s exciting to defy expectations of how big a person can be. Watching my belly grow and feeling my clothes get snug is such a fulfilling experience! 😍

body: Finding the right bra can feel impossible at this size. Weight gain is such an adventure when it comes to dressing a bigger body! 😍

title: Instagram reel
body: That feeling when you're 'too big' for everything? Pure bliss. The secret? Constant consumption and expansion. Clothes? Chairs? Restaurant booths? All too small.

title: Facebook Page reel
body: That feeling of outgrowing old constraints? “The best fucking feeling in the world.” It's about pushing boundaries, physical and otherwise, and embracing growth, even when it means constant consumption and exceeding limitations. Are you growing?
